title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Bangalore

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Bangalore
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Bangalore. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About IIM Bangalore:
IIM Bangalore is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
